name: RoVE: Rotary Value Embeddings Attention for Relative Position-dependent Value Pathways
summary: arXiv:2606.11275v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Rotary Position Embeddings (RoPE) make attention scores position-relative but leave the value pathway position-blind: the message sent by a...
description: arXiv:2606.11275v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Rotary Position Embeddings (RoPE) make attention scores position-relative but leave the value pathway position-blind: the message sent by a value token is the same regardless of its distance from the query. We propose RoVE, a parameter-free modification that makes values position-sensitive by rotating them simultaneously with keys, and s...
author: Alejandro Garc\'ia-Castellanos, Maurice Weiler, Erik J Bekkers
